system.description:
Your mastery of your own voice extends to mastery over all voices. When you gain this ability, note the following key phrases:

You can’t sit there

Actually so funny

Pocket full of sunshine

I’ve never been

My morning routine

Archaeology

Either one is fine

I don’t work here

I’m requesting a refund

A pile of marbles

Toyotathon

Funny you should ask

Once you have heard any being speak 3 of these key phrases, you may forever emulate that being’s voice perfectly when you speak or use your Anomaly Abilities.

If you’re in a hurry, after hearing somebody speak a single key phrase, you can roll [quality].

outcomes.success: you may emulate the target as described above, but only until the end of the current Mission.
outcomes.triscendence: you may add a Key Phrase to your list. It must be at least three words long.
outcomes.failure: they’re just not in your range. You can never Mimic this target.
